title: Bugs
content:
First and very obvious, I forgot to put in the date for the entry. --"

Second, this is not the right green. It has nothing to do with the design goddess. I picked the color myself. This also makes it obvious that I cannot be trusted with color. :P

(So by the end of the week, color might have changed a little bit.)

Off topic: I think I'm quite comfortable with my new keyboard already. It's sweet! (If you already own a Macbook, I think you have pretty much the same keyboard.)

Anyway, it's time to start working.

Good Day~
